## What you tried first

- [ ] `./quickstart/flagship-demo/run.sh --offline`
- [ ] `python3 benchmarks/public-comparison/run_benchmark.py`

## First impression (under 5 minutes)

What was clear? What was confusing?

## Trust signal quality

How did reasoning + verification + trace outputs affect trust?

## Friction points

Where did the experience slow down or fail?

## Most important next improvement

If only one thing should be improved next, what is it?
